title: [CI:DOCS] Update podmanimages README.md
body:
Updates to the README.md for the contrib/podmanimages directory.

This completes the changes to answer this Buildah issue: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1693
and then also adds the quay.io/conatiners/podman images to the list of images.

Buildah PR: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/2509

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *TomSweeneyRedHat* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Can you clean up your commit messages.
@rhatdan, I'm clueless, what are you seeing that's wrong?
Can I get some merge love on this one?
